'''âw-ng-n''' ('''kawangan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hipe|hipe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ng-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hipe|hipe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-ng-n
|-
! Lemma
| kawangan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwangan|thiwangan]] || [[word:jiwangan|jiwangan]] || [[word:shiwangan|shiwangan]] || [[word:kiwangan|kiwangan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwangan|thuthuwangan]] || [[word:jujuwangan|jujuwangan]] || [[word:shushuwangan|shushuwangan]] || [[word:kukuwangan|kukuwangan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwangan|thuwangan]] || [[word:juwangan|juwangan]] || [[word:shuwangan|shuwangan]] || [[word:kuwangan|kuwangan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwangan|thuwangan]] || [[word:juwangan|juwangan]] || [[word:shuwangan|shuwangan]] || [[word:kuwangan|kuwangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewangan|thewangan]] || [[word:jewangan|jewangan]] || [[word:shewangan|shewangan]] || [[word:kewangan|kewangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowangan|thothowangan]] || [[word:jojowangan|jojowangan]] || [[word:shoshowangan|shoshowangan]] || [[word:kokowangan|kokowangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowangan|thowangan]] || [[word:jowangan|jowangan]] || [[word:showangan|showangan]] || [[word:kowangan|kowangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowangan|thowangan]] || [[word:jowangan|jowangan]] || [[word:showangan|showangan]] || [[word:kowangan|kowangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwangan|thĂŠwangan]] || [[word:jĂŠwangan|jĂŠwangan]] || [[word:shĂŠwangan|shĂŠwangan]] || [[word:kĂŠwangan|kĂŠwangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawangan|thathawangan]] || [[word:jajawangan|jajawangan]] || [[word:shashawangan|shashawangan]] || [[word:kakawangan|kakawangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawangan|thawangan]] || [[word:jawangan|jawangan]] || [[word:shawangan|shawangan]] || [[word:kawangan|kawangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawangan|thawangan]] || [[word:jawangan|jawangan]] || [[word:shawangan|shawangan]] || [[word:kawangan|kawangan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawangan|shawangan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawangan|goshawangan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawangan|gokishawangan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawanganĂŒ|shawanganĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawanganknĂŒ|goshawanganknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawanganĂŒ|gokishawanganĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawanganshĂ«|shawanganshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawangankshĂ«|goshawangankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawanganshĂ«|gokishawanganshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawanganro|shawanganro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawangankro|goshawangankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawanganro|gokishawanganro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawanganmu|shawanganmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawangankmu|goshawangankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawanganmu|gokishawanganmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawangansher|shawangansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawanganksher|goshawanganksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawangansher|gokishawangansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawangang|shawangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawangankng|goshawangankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawangang|gokishawangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawanganya|shawanganya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawangankya|goshawangankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawanganya|gokishawanganya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawanganyam|shawanganyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawangankyam|goshawangankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawanganyam|gokishawanganyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawanganĂŒshĂ«|shawanganĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawanganknĂŒshĂ«|goshawanganknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawanganĂŒshĂ«|gokishawanganĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawanganĂŒro|shawanganĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawanganknĂŒro|goshawanganknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawanganĂŒro|gokishawanganĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawanganĂŒmu|shawanganĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawanganknĂŒmu|goshawanganknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawanganĂŒmu|gokishawanganĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawanganshĂ«nĂŒ|shawanganshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawangankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawangankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawanganshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawanganshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawanganshĂ«ro|shawanganshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawangankshĂ«ro|goshawangankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawanganshĂ«ro|gokishawanganshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawanganshĂ«mu|shawanganshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawangankshĂ«mu|goshawangankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawanganshĂ«mu|gokishawanganshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawanganronĂŒ|shawanganronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawangankronĂŒ|goshawangankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawanganronĂŒ|gokishawanganronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawanganroshĂ«|shawanganroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawangankroshĂ«|goshawangankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawanganroshĂ«|gokishawanganroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawanganromu|shawanganromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawangankromu|goshawangankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawanganromu|gokishawanganromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawanganmunĂŒ|shawanganmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawangankmunĂŒ|goshawangankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawanganmunĂŒ|gokishawanganmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawanganmushĂ«|shawanganmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawangankmushĂ«|goshawangankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawanganmushĂ«|gokishawanganmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawanganmuro|shawanganmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawangankmuro|goshawangankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawanganmuro|gokishawanganmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
